title: Unit Testing & TDD
description: Explore Unit Testing, test frameworks, assertions, and Test-Driven Development (TDD) loop flows.
learningObjectives: Write isolated assertion test suites for gameplay logic
Identify red-green-refactor loops in Test-Driven Development
Design interfaces with mock dependencies for isolated unit test scenarios

sections.title: Isolated Assertions and Test Cycles
sections.content: Testing confirms code executes as specified. Unit tests run isolated tests targeting individual methods. Test-Driven Development (TDD) flips implementation ordering: write a failing test first (Red), implement code to pass test (Green), and optimize structure (Refactor). Testing code ensures future optimizations do not break existing game calculations.

sections.title: Simple Unit Test Assertion
